title: Decentralized Moderation — Submission Metadata v1
description: Schema for the metadata JSON object referenced by a submission's metadata CAC hash. Validated in the submit interface before submission, and checked by moderators against the actual content ('metadata honestly describes the content'). See README P4.

schemaVersion.description: Metadata schema version. Must be 1 for this schema.

type.description: The kind of entry this is. Coarse object type used for filtering and display in search front ends.

title.description: Human-readable title. Must honestly describe the content.

description.description: Longer human-readable description of the content. Optional but recommended; must honestly describe the content when present.

topics.description: Topics this entry claims to be about. MUST match the on-chain topic string list submitted alongside the fee. Normalized form: lowercase, trimmed, Unicode NFC. Capped to keep finalization gas bounded (README P2).

items.$comment: Normalized topic string: lowercase, trimmed, NFC. The contract stores keccak256(topic) as the index key; this pattern rejects leading/trailing whitespace and uppercase ASCII so 'Biology' and 'biology ' cannot fragment the index. Full NFC normalization is enforced by the submit interface before hashing.

language.description: Primary language of the content as a BCP-47 tag (e.g. 'en', 'en-US', 'sw', 'zh-Hans'). Optional; omit for language-neutral content such as images without text.

contentType.description: IANA media type of the content addressed by the content CAC hash (e.g. 'text/html', 'image/png', 'video/mp4', 'application/pdf'). Must match the actual content.

source.description: Optional origin reference for the content — e.g. the Swarm feed, URL, or anythread string this entry annotates or was published from. Informational only; not verified on-chain.
